label: 布尔差集
description: 从 base shape 中减去 tool shape，追加 difference(base,tool) 到 Geometry DSL。何时用：在实体上挖空腔 / 开孔 / 开槽 / 切口（不要用 primitive 去假装这种被切掉的形态）。
description-en: Subtract tool shape from base shape, appending `difference(base,tool)` to the Geometry DSL. Use when: hollowing a cavity, cutting an opening/hole/slot/recess into a solid — do NOT fake a cut form with primitives.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须同时含 base_id 与 tool_id 两个形状）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must already contain both the base_id and tool_id shapes.

inputs.name: base_id
inputs.label: 基础形状 id
inputs.description: 被减的形状 id；从上游 shape（g_box / g_extrude / …）的 id 输出端口连入，或填其 id 参数
inputs.description-en: Id of the shape kept (minuend). Feed from an upstream shape's `id` output port, or set the shape's `id` param and pass the literal.

inputs.name: tool_id
inputs.label: 切割形状 id
inputs.description: 用来切除的形状 id；同样来自上游某个 shape 的 id 输出
inputs.description-en: Id of the shape subtracted (tool). Also comes from an upstream shape's `id` output.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 diff{n}
inputs.description-en: Custom id for this result; empty = auto diff{n}.

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加 difference 后的 Geometry

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行结果的 id（供下游 g_part / 其它 CSG 引用）；引用失败时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the result line (for downstream g_part / CSG). Empty string when the refs failed.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: 引用错误时的原因（base_id/tool_id 缺失或在上游 Geometry 中找不到）；非空表示本 op 未追加任何几何——批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取此端口
outputs.description-en: Reason when a ref is bad (base_id/tool_id missing or not found upstream). Non-empty means this op appended NOTHING even though the batch may report ok — always read this port.
